summary: Exceptional audience recording with translucent clarity that captures an immersive Dead performance.
review: Nick rates this tape five stars, praising the astonishing transparency and vividness of the audience source—calling it a “certain clarity only an audience recording can bring.” The show itself is described as a mesmerizing, head‑surrounding experience, indicating both superb musical delivery and top‑tier tape quality.

ai_rating.rationale: A single glowing 5‑star review highlights both outstanding performance and excellent audience recording quality, leading to a high rating but low confidence due to limited data.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Translucent, crystal‑clear sound that immerses the listener; praised as an “amazing, quality piece” of audience tape with full resonance and dramatic presence.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Not detailed in review; focus is on overall immersive feel rather than specific set structure.
